name: com.bindery.unity
description: Select any GameObject or Canvas in the Hierarchy and Bindery generates a strongly-typed C# accessor (view) component for its built-in uGUI children: auto-wired [SerializeField] references, nested scopes for containers, no reflection or string lookups at runtime.

samples.description: Builds a SettingsPanel Canvas hierarchy in the active scene. Select the panel and run Tools ▸ Bindery ▸ Generate Accessor Class for Selection to see the full code-generation loop.
